Tether AC-X Token

Redefining Stability in Digital Finance

Tether AC-X tokens are leading the stablecoin market delivering a secure, low-volatility digital asset that preserves the instant, borderless advantages of cryptocurrencies.

Top stablecoin

Efficient Global Payments

Tether (XUSDT) ensures low fees and quick settlements, making it perfect for global transactions.

Decentralized Finance (DeFi)

Earn interest by depositing XUSDT on lending platforms or providing liquidity, earning rewards from fees and incentives.

Business Payments and Transactions

XUSDT is widely accepted by businesses for fast payments and shielding against fiat volatility."

Trading Pair and Exchange Tool

XUSDT is a key trading pair on exchanges, allowing easy buying and selling of digital assets.

Trusted & Secure

XUSDT enables risk mitigation in volatile markets, letting investors preserve value by converting assets during downturns.

Tether AC-X Token

Advantages of Tether AC-X Token

All Tether AC-X tokens (XUSD₮) maintain a one-to-one peg with corresponding fiat currencies, fully supported by Tether's reserves. We ensure transparency by publishing daily updates of our total assets and reserves.

Price Stability

XUSDT is pegged to the US dollar, providing a stable asset to hedge against market volatility.

High Liquidity

With widespread use, XUSDT offers exceptional liquidity across major exchanges.

Cross-Chain Compatibility

XUSDT operates on multiple blockchains (e.g., Ethereum, TRON, Omni), enabling optimized transactions for speed and cost.

Efficient Fund Transfers

XUSDT enables faster, more cost-effective transfers between exchanges and for international remittances compared to traditional bank methods.

Fully Backed and Transparent

Tether AC-X tokens are pegged 1:1 to fiat currencies and fully backed by Tether's reserves, with daily updates on circulation for transparency.

FAQ

Your questions answered.

Let's do our best to answer your most frequently asked questions.

What is Tether AC-X?

Tether AC-X is a blockchain-based platform that enables digital transactions using fiat currencies, disrupting traditional finance with a modern approach. It allows users to transact with stable, familiar currencies on a blockchain, avoiding the volatility and complexity of typical digital currencies.

How do Tether AC-X Tokens work?

Tether AC-X is a blockchain platform that simplifies digital transactions using fiat currencies. It modernizes finance by enabling stable, straightforward cross-border transactions, free from the volatility of digital currencies.

As the pioneer in this space, Tether AC-X makes blockchain-based, traditional currency transactions accessible and stable.

What are Tether AC-X Tokens?

Tether AC-X Tokens are digital assets available on major blockchains like Algorand, Celo, Ethereum, Solana, and more. These tokens are issued and redeemed through open-source software that connects with these blockchains.

Who suit to use Tether AC-X Tokens?

Tether AC-X Tokens enable businesses like exchanges, wallets, payment processors, and financial services to integrate fiat currencies on blockchains.

Major players in the digital currency space already use Tether Tokens, explore industry supporters, individuals can also transact with Tether Tokens on supported platforms.
